title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 192.2440 - Assistance to be given
text:
192.2440.  Assistance to be given. — When an eligible adult gives consent to receive protective services, the department shall assist the adult in locating and arranging for necessary services in the least restrictive environment reasonably available.
(L. 1980 S.B. 576 § 4, A.L. 2014 H.B. 1299 Revision § 192.1090 merged with S.B. 491 § 197.1016) 
Effective 8-28-14 (H.B. 1299 Revision); 1-01-17 (S.B. 491) 
Transferred 2014; formerly 660.265
